subject: [PATCH v7 3/6] nfsd: implement server-stats-get netlink handler

2026-07-17.patch_summary: This patch implements a new netlink handler for the NFS server, allowing users to retrieve server statistics via netlink. The handler streams statistics across multiple messages, dividing them into sections such as scalar stats and per-version procedure counts. This approach prevents overflow issues when packing counters into a single message. The patch also includes documentation updates and code changes in various files.
